name: Ivar Grimstad
title: Jakarta EE Developer Advocate
bio: Ivar Grimstad is the Jakarta EE Developer Advocate at Eclipse Foundation. He is a Norwegian Java Champion and JUG Leader based in Sweden. Besides advocating the Jakarta EE technologies, Ivar contributes to the Jakarta EE specifications and is the PMC Lead for Eclipse Enterprise for Java (EE4J). He is also one of the specification leads for Jakarta MVC and represents Eclipse Foundation on the JCP Executive Committee. Ivar is also involved in various other open-source projects and communities. He is a frequent speaker at International developer conferences.

name: Ronald Francisco Vargas Quesada
title: Information Architect
bio: Ronald Vargas brings over 35 years of Oracle DBA expertise, with a career rooted in Costa Rica. He played a key role in founding the Oracle User Group in Costa Rica and co-founded user groups in Guatemala, Honduras, El Salvador, and Panama. Ronald has been a frequent international speaker across Latin America and Spain, sharing his deep technical knowledge and leadership experience. As a university professor for more than 12 years and a former Oracle University instructor for over a decade, he delivered more than 200 courses and was recognized among the top 15 instructors in Latin America by Oracle University. Highly active across social media platforms including X, Facebook, YouTube, and Blogspot.Ronald continuously shares insights and provides webinars for educational institutions and professional organizations. He served as Technology Director for LAOUC for three years and has been a key contributor to the organization of the annual Latin America Oracle User Group Tour since 2010.

name: Daniel Andres Pelaez Lopez
title: Senior Staff Software Engineer
bio:
Passionate about IT architectures and software development at all levels, from solution design to software implementation. I like to solve difficult problems using high technology, applying not common solutions.

Love typed languages and compilers; I believe we create better software with them. Also, I believe decoupling design and automated testing as first citizens on the development cycle.

Have over 15 years of experience working in the software industry in the financial, aircraft, entertainment, and government sectors in national and international companies.

Writer. Created https://coderstower.com as a way to share and improve our software engineering bases in our technology community.

name: José Díaz
title: Software Architect
bio:
Java Architect and Technology Leader with over 20 years of experience designing, modernizing, and scaling enterprise platforms. Specialist in Java architecture, cloud-native microservices, CI/CD pipelines, and solutions based on LLMs, RAG, and AI/ML services.

I have led Java Chapters, technical communities, and high-performing teams, promoting quality standards, modern engineering practices, architectural patterns, automation, documentation, and the adoption of new technologies.

I have extensive experience with Spring Boot, Quarkus, Java 8–21, serverless computing, containers, and distributed architectures on Oracle Cloud, AWS, and GCP.

My focus is on building resilient, scalable, and observable systems, guiding teams toward enterprise-level engineering practices.

name: Enrique Zamudio
title: Principal Software Engineer
bio:
Enrique Zamudio is a professional programmer since 1994, based in Mexico City. He has specialized in server-side development with Java since 2000, focusing on backend applications, such as transactional switches for e-commerce and payment platforms. He is the author of the open source projects jAlarms, j8583 and ScalaSQL. Enrique joined the Ceylon Language development core team on January 2012, where he's contributed to the language module, the web IDE and the JVM compiler, and is the lead developer of the Ceylon-to-JavaScript compiler.
He's currently Principal Software Engineer at Bitso.

name: Lorenzo Solano Martinez
title: Software Architect
bio:
Software Architect with +15 years of experience with .NET (from 4.x to 10.0), Java, and JavaScript and TypeScript. I have experience in the Telecommunication and ISV industries. Strong focus on software products ROI and quality both internal (structural) and external (functional). Versed in Clean Architecture, SOLID Principles, Test Driven Development, Test Automation, DevSecOps, Agile Engineering Practices, and Agile Methodologies. I have practical experience with Object Oriented Analysis and Design, using well-known principles such as SOLID, Domain Driven Design (DDD), and Design Patterns. Also, I can combine OOP with Functional Programming principles.


Education and Certifications

. Master in Project Management.
Software engineer.
Certified Scrum Master.
Certified Scrum Product Owner.
Certified Scrum Developer.
Registered Education Provider from Scrum Alliance (Trainer).
Agile Certified Practitioner (PMI-ACP)

Current Practice

.Software Architect.
Consultant

name: David Joa
title: Founder
bio: David Joa Morales is a technology consultant, Senior Agile Coach, and founder of Techcode, where he promotes agility practices, DevOps, and software development modernization. He has led transformations in the financial and telecommunications sectors and heads agility training at Bricks Agile Academy. With over 20 years of experience as a professor at INTEC, he combines practical expertise and academic training to strengthen digital capabilities in organizations.

name: Juan Thomas Angel Montilla
title: Software Engineer
bio: Juan Thomás Ángel Montilla is a Software Engineer with 7 years of experience in the information technology industry. He specializes in the Java ecosystem and has expert-level mastery of the entire Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC), covering everything from requirements analysis and design to development, debugging, and testing.

name: Priamo germosen
title: Senior Software Engineer
bio: Software engineer with over 20 years of experience in Java and distributed systems. He currently works on AdTech platforms for CTV, focusing on backend architecture and high-scale systems

name: Aneudy Vargas
title: Sr. Android Developer
bio: Software developer with over 9 years of experience, specializing in Android development with a strong focus on architecture, concurrency, and scalable application development. He has extensive experience with Kotlin, coroutines, and modern development patterns, building robust and maintainable solutions. Currently focused on Kotlin Multiplatform and creating efficient shared architectures across platforms.

name: José Rafael Almonte Cabrera
title: Software Engineer
bio:
He is a Telematics & Software Engineer and Data Science graduate with 4 years of experience building solutions in FinTech and E-learning platforms. His work is driven by responsibility, teamwork, and continuous learning, and he is passionate about advancing in Software Engineering, AI/ML, Data Science, Sports Analytics, and Finance.

Outside of work, he enjoys traveling and exploring new cultures, following the NBA, MLB, NFL, and European soccer, playing padel, experimenting with new recipes, reading, and practicing piano.

name: Brayan Muñoz V
title: Software Engineer
bio: I'm a Software Engineer and Data Scientist with an MSc in Data Science (UCJC) and a degree in Telematics Engineering (PUCMM). With over 5 years of software development experience and 2 years focused on AI and Data Science, I’m also a board member of the Dominican Republic Java User Group (@JavaDominicano), where I speak on topics like Java and Machine Learning. Additionally, I teach at PUCMM in areas such as Programming and AI, and actively contribute to open-source projects.

name: Gilson Martins
title: Oracle DBA
bio:
Teacher / Instructor / Speaker

With 20 years of experience in IT, I have spent the past 18 years specializing in Oracle Database Administration, working with versions from 8i to 26ai and earning multiple certifications (OCA, OCP, OCE, OCS). I am an Oracle GoldenGate Certified Expert with 14 years of hands-on experience, from OGG 10g to 26ai.

name: Freddy Peña
title: Founder & Software Engineer
bio:
Founder of Alphnology, Technical Consultant, and a passionate Software Engineer with over 12 years of expertise in Java development and 8+ years of experience managing and implementing SAP B1 projects. Holding a Master's degree in Web Engineering, I am also a dedicated educator currently teaching at PUCMM and an active member of the Dominican Java Community. I am skilled in designing, developing, and deploying high-performance, scalable applications using Java and various modern frameworks like Spring Boot, Vaadin Flow, Quarkus, Jakarta EE, Vert.x, and Hibernate. I am also an enthusiast of open-source projects.

With proven experience in integrating enterprise-level software, providing expert technical consulting, and managing end-to-end development lifecycles, I focus on code quality, system optimization, and scalability.

My approach spans from developing enterprise applications to implementing cloud solutions, always adhering to best practices and maintaining high code quality. I am always learning about the latest emerging technologies and staying up-to-date with new trends in the software development world.

name: Francisco Munoz Alvarez
title: Distinguished Product Manager
bio:
Francisco Munoz Alvarez is an author and popular speaker at many Oracle conferences around the world. He was also the founder and past President of LAOUC (Latin American Oracle User Groups Community), CLOUG (Chilean Oracle Users Group), APACOUC (APAC Oracle Users Group Community, which is the umbrella organization for all of APAC), IAOUG (Independent Australian Oracle Users Group), SGOUG (Singapore Oracle Users Group), and NZOUG (New Zealand Oracle Users Group).

He also worked in the first team to introduce Oracle to South America (Oracle 6 and the beta version of Oracle 7). He was also the first Master Oracle 7 Database Administrator in South America, as well as the first Latin American Oracle professional to be awarded a double ACE (ACE in 2008 and ACE Director in 2009) by Oracle HQ.

In 2010, he had the privilege to receive a prestigious Oracle Magazine Editor’s Choice Award as the Oracle Evangelist of the Year–a huge recognition for his outstanding achievements in the Oracle world including the creation and organization of the already famous OTN Tours that are the biggest Oracle evangelist events in the world.

Currently, Francisco works for Oracle, as a Distinguished Product Manager for Maximum Availability Architecture (MAA) and Competitive Intelligence, responsible for driving Oracle MAA adoption across the globe.

Outside his technological life, Francisco is a retired US first responder and paramedic. He is also an elite international athlete representing his country as part of the Australian dragon boat national team, the Auroras.

name: Diego Silva Limaco
title: Software Architect
bio:
Java Architect and Technology Leader with over 20 years of experience designing, modernizing, and scaling enterprise platforms. Specialist in Java architecture, cloud-native microservices, CI/CD pipelines, and solutions based on LLMs, RAG, and AI/ML services.

I have led Java Chapters, technical communities, and high-performing teams, promoting quality standards, modern engineering practices, architectural patterns, automation, documentation, and the adoption of new technologies.

I have extensive experience with Spring Boot, Quarkus, Java 8–21, serverless computing, containers, and distributed architectures on Oracle Cloud, AWS, and GCP.

My focus is on building resilient, scalable, and observable systems, guiding teams toward enterprise-level engineering practices.

name: Vicente Suc
title: Co-Founder
bio: Systems Engineer, Co-founder of CSN and Proticket.io, Co-Leader of the Java User Group and Leader of the AWS User Group Guatemala, specializing in creating secure and scalable solutions on the AWS cloud. I have led projects in the healthcare, education, BPO, concert, and digital platform sectors, combining artificial intelligence, serverless services, and business acumen. I am currently driving technology initiatives that optimize processes and enhance the user experience.

name: Aluis Marte
title: Java Application Architect
bio: Java Spring Boot developer and cat lover with over 12 years of experience working in various industries, including: Lottery, Casino, Fiber Optics Engineering, and Credit Reporting. With a deep-seated hatred for warnings

name: Cedric Clyburn
title: Senior Developer Advocate
bio:
Cedric Clyburn (@cedricclyburn), Senior Developer Advocate at Red Hat, is an enthusiastic software developer with a background in Kubernetes, DevOps, and container tools. Focused on open-source software, he both contributes (e.g., Podman, vLLM) and enjoys speaking, with prior experience at Devoxx, WeAreDevelopers, The Linux Foundation, and more.

Cedric also spends (too much) time creating video and written content helping developers learn new topics in emerging technologies, with over 2M+ views online. He's based in New York City and is an organizer of the local Kubernetes Community Day.

name: Oscar Trejo
title: QA Chapter Lead
bio: Oscar Trejo is specialized in QA and software engineering. Known for automating workflows, building scalable tools, and developing QA and software engineers with a strategic vision. Actively engaged in sharing insights and mentoring QA professionals, with a strong reputation as a mentor and leader in the field. Currently is Chapter Lead at Personal, Argentina.

name: Bryam Vega
title: Senior Consultant Developer
bio:
Soy un ingeniero de software apasionado y versátil, con más de 7 años de experiencia especializado en Java, enfocado en desarrollar soluciones escalables y de alta calidad. He liderado equipos utilizando metodologías ágiles y me he consolidado como una autoridad técnica en el diseño e implementación de diversas arquitecturas, incluidas microservicios, orientadas a eventos y sistemas monolíticos.

Mi profundo conocimiento de los patrones de diseño y las mejores prácticas en el desarrollo de software me permite entregar soluciones robustas y escalables que superan las expectativas de los clientes. Actualmente, desempeño un rol destacado como tech lead, dedicándome a crear soluciones de alta calidad que reflejan mi amor por la tecnología y la innovación.

name: Betzabe Maria Salas Vergara
title: Team Leader
bio: I am a Systems Engineer, specializing in Software Engineering. I have over 10 years of experience developing and designing applications for the financial sector. Excellence, passion, continuous learning, teamwork, respect, tolerance, assertive communication, eagerness to keep learning, and humility are some of the words that define me. I am a passionate person who fully commits to what I set out to do; I give my heart to projects and never give up until I successfully complete them. I seek solutions to any challenges that arise and always strive to do so with the highest quality and attention to detail, ensuring the result is flawless and of great value to stakeholders.

name: Karvin Jiménez
title: Web Developer Fullstack
bio:
Game development is something I’ve always been passionate about—it’s the area of programming that inspired me to study systems engineering. I have significant experience in game programming using graphics libraries.

Why did I decide to learn graphics libraries? Well, unfortunately, game engines like Unity or Unreal don’t provide support for developing games on older consoles. As a result, game development for these classic consoles would be lost if we only relied on game engines.

name: Željko Kozina
title: Technical Architect
bio:
Željko has spent over 15 years in IT, mostly consulting for banks and insurance companies, with a focus on modernising legacy systems. Along the way, he developed deep expertise in JVM-based technologies and has become a go-to voice on topics such as API design.

When he's not untangling someone else's technical debt, he's happily creating his own through a growing collection of personal projects he enthusiastically starts and occasionally finishes. Željko is passionate about sharing knowledge in a way that actually sticks, which usually means keeping things practical, a little entertaining, and free of unnecessary jargon.

name: Franklin Castillo
title: Full-Stack Developer
bio:
I’m Franklin Castillo, a Java Backend and Full-Stack Developer driven by a passion for building scalable, efficient, and secure applications. With hands-on experience in Java, Spring Boot, and React, I specialize in designing end-to-end solutions that combine strong backend performance with seamless user experiences.

My expertise covers microservices architecture, RESTful and GraphQL APIs, cloud deployment, and database management, enabling the development of reliable, high-performing enterprise systems.

name: Eddú Meléndez Gonzales
title: Staff Software Engineer
bio: Eddú Meléndez is a Staff Software Engineer at Docker and is currently one of the members of the Testcontainers team, contributing to the Spring ecosystem and other Open Source projects since 2015. During his free time, he likes to research about new trends and contribute to Open Source projects.

name: Grace Ableidinger
title: AI Developer Advocate
bio: Grace Ableidinger is an AI Engineer and Developer Advocate at Red Hat based in Raleigh, NC. She is passionate about making AI accessible to everyone and exploring how open-source technology can drive real-world impact. She is dedicated to building communities and resources that empower people to use AI to build a better world.
